story_shape: the two-way edge of Oregon's elite front -- the only returning Power Four rusher graded elite against both pass and run

plan.spine: a breakout edge rusher who grades elite against both the pass AND the run returns as half of Oregon's elite edge tandem
blend: the only returning Power Four edge with 80+ PFF grades as both pass rusher and run defender
pairs with Matayo Uiagalelei on a loaded Oregon front
plan.payoff: 9.5 sacks and 16 TFL -- and elite grades stopping the run, too
plan.forward_stake: whether the complete edge becomes an All-American on a title contender

hook: Teitum Tuioti is the rarest kind of edge rusher: the only returning Power Four player graded elite against both the pass and the run. On a loaded Oregon front, he's the complete one -- and he's only getting better.
expand: Tuioti's 2025 was a career-best breakout across the board -- 68 tackles, 16 tackles for loss, 9.5 sacks -- and the distinction underneath it is what sets him apart: per PFF, he was the only returning Power Four edge to grade above 80 as both a pass rusher and a run defender. That two-way completeness, paired with edge-mate Matayo Uiagalelei, gives Oregon a front that can wreck a game without blitzing. The forward stakes are All-America honors on a national-title contender: the production is established and the profile is complete, so 2026 is about turning a great season into a dominant one. He's the every-down edge a championship defense is built on.
style: Tuioti is a complete, two-way edge -- the kind that doesn't have to come off the field on early downs. The PFF distinction is the whole scouting report: elite grades against both the pass and the run, which means he can set a hard edge against the run game and win as a pass rusher on the next snap. The 9.5 sacks and 16 tackles for loss are the disruption; the run grade is the part most edges his age don't have. At 6-3, 263 he plays with power and balance, holding up at the point and converting it into pressure. On a deep Oregon front he doesn't have to do it alone -- which is exactly what makes him so hard to block one-on-one.
style_layers_pending: no offensive PBP for an edge -- box (sacks/TFL) + PFF two-way grade + attributed scouting grounded; fan-vs-rival discourse descriptors pending discourse-extraction cleanup

sources.label: 247Sports -- Teitum Tuioti announces return to Oregon for 2026
